title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri.com - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri.com - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
